rules: NEVER default to 'woman reading a book' — rotate through all categories
Match the image to the campaign type: product shots for product emails, lifestyle for JSH, abstract for newsletter
Each campaign in a week should use a DIFFERENT visual style
Use warm amber/gold/brown tones consistent with Beezy Beez brand palette (#8b4513)
Women depicted should be diverse and age-appropriate (50+), never stock-photo generic
Avoid: cold blue tones, clinical/medical imagery, sad/lonely scenes, generic stock photography
Include product (honey jar) in at least 40% of campaign images
